title: 10 x SabreCut SCPZ2152_10 152mm PZ2 Magnetic Impact Screwdriver Driver Bits Set Pozi Pozidriv Heavy Duty
features: 10 piece 152mm PZ2 SabreCut Magnetic Impact Driver Bits with Storage Pouch
SabreCut Revolution professional quality PoziDriv (PZ2) screwdriver bits specially designed for use with impact drivers, bits have a forged tip for greater impact resistance and a longer lifetime
Tough heat-treated impact torsion screwdriver bits that provide improved durability and reduced breakage
Ideal for continuous high torque use withstanding changes of load due to elasticity
Professional quality impact driver bits supplied with storage pouch
description: Product Description Package contents: - 10 x PZ2 152mm Impact Bits - SCPZ2152 SabreCut Revolution ShockZone Impact Screwdriver Bits with Twist Drive - Drive Faster. Professional-grade impact screwdriver bits feature torsion zones that provide greater impact capacity and evenly distribute impact throughout the accessory, reducing breakage due to the flexibility of torsion zones. - Designed for impact drills and high-power drills. - Available in 5 sizes - 32mm, 50mm, 65mm, 89mm and 152mm. - Forged tip for greater impact resistance and longer life. - Durable heat-treated tips for improved durability with a twist zone for reduced breakage. - Ideal for continuous high torque applications. - Ultra-resistant for tough fixing applications. - Precision-machined profile for optimal fit and less cam-out. - Black oxide finish for corrosion resistance. Suitable for the following manufacturers: Any 1/4 inch hex connection. SabreCut Revolution Impact Rated Technology - Drives You Faster SabreCut Revolution Impact Driving Accessories are specifically designed to handle the most demanding IMPACT driving applications. The complete range of SabreCut products is made from carefully selected, engineered and engineered material compositions to provide optimized durability and unbeatable break-resistance, saving you time and money. Safety Warning Please always follow the safety instructions provided by your power tool manufacturer
